svg.title: Multiplatform Ads Dashboard Architecture
svg.desc: Flow from data sources through input layer to Looker Studio dashboard

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How do I structure Meta Ads data in Google Sheets?')
sendPrompt('How do I structure Google Ads data in Google Sheets?')
sendPrompt('How do I structure TikTok Ads data in Google Sheets?')
sendPrompt('How do I track other platforms like Twitter or LinkedIn Ads?')
sendPrompt('How do I set up Google Sheets as a data source for ads reporting?')
sendPrompt('Should I use a database or Google Sheets for Looker Studio ads data?')
sendPrompt('What charts should I put in a multiplatform ads dashboard in Looker Studio?')

svg.text: migrate to DB kalau data besar
